title: Compliance Control
description: Schema for a compliance control mapped to one or more regulatory frameworks, as used by compliance automation platforms.

controlId.description: Unique identifier for the compliance control.

name.description: Short name or title of the control.

description.description: Detailed description of what the control requires.

domain.description: Compliance domain this control falls under (e.g., 'Access Control', 'Encryption', 'Incident Response').

requirementText.description: The verbatim requirement text from the framework.

implementationGuidance.description: Guidance on how to implement this control.

evidenceTypes.description: Types of evidence that can satisfy this control (e.g., 'Screenshot', 'Policy Document', 'Log Export', 'API Integration').

automatable.description: Whether evidence collection for this control can be automated via API integration.

owner.description: Team or individual responsible for this control.
